name: Devil's Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together cocoa and boiling water until smooth. Set aside to cool to room temperature.
2. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and sugar with low speed for about 1 minute to blend.
3. Add egg substitute, vanilla, and sugar mixture to the cocoa mixture and mix well.
4. Add margarine to the dry ingredients along with the cocoa mixture and mix at medium speed for about 1 minute until combined.
5. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch square or 9x13 cake pan.
6. Bake in preheated oven at 350°F for about 30 minutes, or until a cake tester comes out clean and a knife inserted into the center pulls away from the sides of the pan.
7. Allow to cool in the pan before cutting into 18 pieces.
8. Serve cold with whipped topping or warm with chocolate sauce. One serving equals one Bread Exchange plus one Fat Exchange; 119 calories, 16 grams carbs, 2 grams protein, and 6 grams fat.
